hero.title: About HO Oxygen
hero.subtitle: Our story, mission, and commitment to safe gas supply across Nepal.

story.title: Our Story
story.body: HO Oxygen Industries Pvt. Ltd. has been providing safe, reliable gas supply to hospitals, clinics, and industrial users across Nepal. Our commitment to quality and safety drives everything we do. We are among few oxygen factories operating in Nepal during covid-19 pandemic and have been a lifeline for many healthcare providers during this critical time.
